## [00:00 - 03:01]

This lesson is all about the problem solution path, otherwise known as the PS path. So this is how you create real value in your pre-launch, real value in your sideways sales letter. And it's how you make sure that you give that value without giving away everything, without just giving away the farm. One of the things that is a real thing that you have to consider is that if you give people too much value, if you give them too much content, then they'll actually, in their mind, or maybe they'll actually say it out loud, they'll think, wow, this is really great. I love this person. He's giving me so much value. And as soon as I get through all of the free stuff that he or she's given to me, then I'll go back and buy. And when they think that, the reality is, is they never come back and buy. So there's a fine line between delivering real value and delivering so much that they end up deciding not to buy from you.
